plugin.name: E2ScreenRecorder
plugin.author: Ossama Hashim / SamoTech
plugin.description: Full-featured Screen Recorder for all Enigma2 STBs. Screenshots (PNG/JPEG/BMP) and video recording (MP4/AVI). Built-in WebIF for remote control from any browser on the LAN. Zero mandatory dependencies. Python 2.7-3.12+ compatible.
